parties.name: PROVINCE, DANIELA 3866 CESAR CHAVEZ ST SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94131

calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Mar-28-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Daniela Province, via zoom, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court points to the issue of whether this is the proper venue for this petition and asks Ms. Province to offer advocacy. Ms. Province advises that she is seeking dual citizenship and that the Italian consulate is requesting an order signed by a judge to consider her request. Ms. Province offers additional testimony advocating for her petition.

After additional discussion, the Petition to Establish Fact of Birth is granted and the order is signed in open court.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Teebay. Not reported.

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Mar-21-2022 Continued To Mar-28-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
